event: View of a Russian Orthodox Church
description: A watercolor painting within an arched decorative frame showing a Russian Orthodox church with a tall multi-tiered bell tower topped by a cross and several golden onion domes. The church has an ornate brick facade with arched windows and decorative elements. Small figures and a horse-drawn carriage are visible at street level. Adjacent buildings flank the church. The sky is pale blue and pink, and the overall tone is warm and delicate. The watercolor technique gives the image a soft, luminous quality.

_meta.title: The Church of the Gatchina Jaeger Regiment in St. Petersburg
